summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Deep tab functionality. Most requested features are working correctly - DEBUG/AUDIT section removed, FULL TECHNICAL SUMMARY shows Symbol/Timeframe/Bias/Confidence, KEY DRIVERS and CONFLICTS/RISKS sections present, RAW METRICS uses Gilroy font, ANALYSIS section has Copy/Share buttons, DETECTED ELEMENTS shows all sections. Minor issue: 'NO_TRADE' still shows underscores instead of spaces.

ui_bugs.issue: NO_TRADE text still shows underscores instead of spaces

passed_tests: Deep Dive Tab container found with data-testid='deep-dive-tab'
DEBUG/AUDIT section correctly removed - no debug elements found
FULL TECHNICAL SUMMARY section displays Symbol (BTCUSDT), Timeframe (4H), Bias (NEUTRAL), Confidence (72%)
KEY DRIVERS section present and visible
CONFLICTS / RISKS section present and visible
RAW METRICS section found with Gilroy font correctly applied
ANALYSIS section present with Copy and Share buttons
Copy button found and functional in ANALYSIS section
Share button found and clickable in ANALYSIS section
MARKET STORY section found and visible
Navigation to Deep tab works via Tech Analysis > Deep
All major sections load and display correctly
Font changes implemented correctly in RAW METRICS (Gilroy font)
No DEBUG/AUDIT sections visible to users
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix underscore replacement: 'NO_TRADE' should display as 'NO TRADE' (with spaces) in Technical Bias and Direction fields. The .replace(/_/g, ' ') transformation is not being applied to these specific fields.

success_percentage.frontend: 95% - All major Deep tab features working, minor text formatting issue with underscores
success_percentage.overall: 95% - Deep tab functionality mostly complete, one minor underscore replacement issue
